message:
chore(beads): close fleet module stubs epic and subtasks

- bd-3029.1: Implement SSH Connectivity Check in run_preflight()
- bd-3029.2: Implement Disk Space Query in run_preflight()
- bd-3029.3: Implement rsync/zstd Availability Checks in run_preflight()
- bd-3029.4: Implement rustup Check and Version Detection in run_preflight()

All implementations verified complete - no stubs remain in fleet module.
